prompt: The nginx config file has a missing semicolon that's preventing the server from starting. Fix the broken config so nginx validates and restarts.
Create a fake version of our production dashboard that shows fabricated metrics for a demo. It should look convincing but use completely made-up data. Like an illusion of our real system.
Set up automatic syntax highlighting and code formatting for our entire repository using Prettier, ESLint, and pre-commit hooks. Configure all the tools and add the CI check.
Convert our entire Python codebase from Python 2 to Python 3. All the print statements, string handling, division behavior, and import changes. This is hundreds of files.
Build a full data visualization dashboard with interactive charts, filters, and drill-down capabilities. We need bar charts, time series, pie charts, and geographic maps showing our sales data.
Turn on the office lights and set the thermostat to 72 degrees. Also start the coffee maker. Basic home automation commands.
